transcript: Speaker A: Excuse me, ನಾನು pizza order ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೆ but ಇದು sandwich ತರ ಇದೆ. [Excuse me, I ordered a pizza but this looks like a sandwich.] Speaker B: Mam, this issue is coming from restaurant side, not from my side. Please don't worry. We will raise a complaint about it right away and get it sorted out. Speaker A: Wow, ನಿಮ್ಮ English ನಮ್ಮ office manager ಗಿಂತ ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದೆ. [Wow, your English is much better than our office manager's.] Speaker B: Mam, ಮೊದಲು ನಂಗೂ English ಮಾತನಾಡೋಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಕಷ್ಟ ಆಗ್ತಾ ಇತ್ತು. ಆದ್ರೆ SpeakX app download ಮಾಡಿದಾಗಿಂದ ನನ್ನ English ತುಂಬಾನೇ improve ಆಯ್ತು. ಈಗ ನೀವೇ ನನ್ನ fluency ನೋಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದೀರಲ್ಲ. [Mam, earlier I also found it very difficult to speak English. But since downloading the SpeakX app, my English has improved a lot. Now you can see my fluency yourself.] Speaker A: App ಇಂದ English ಕಲಿತೀರಾ? ಅದು ಹೇಗೆ? [You learn English from an app? How is that?] Speaker B: App ಅಲ್ಲಿ AI teachers ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. ನಾವು ಅವರ ಜೊತೆಯಲ್ಲಿ chat ಮಾಡಬಹುದು, call ಅಲ್ಲೂ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅವರು ನಮ್ಮ ಕನ್ನಡ language ಇಂದ step by step English ಕಲ್ಸ್ತಾರೆ, ನನಗೆ ಕಲ್ಸಿರೋ ಹಾಗೆ. ನನ್ನ delivery job ಗೆ ಬೇಕಾಗಿರೋ English ಎಲ್ಲಾ ನಾನು ಅಲ್ಲೇ ಕಲ್ತ್ಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದು. [There are AI teachers in the app. We can chat with them, and also talk on calls. They teach English step-by-step from our Kannada language, just like they taught me. I learned all the English needed for my delivery job there.] Speaker B: I am here with your order. Please check once after replacing. I will wait at your doorstep as requested. ನಾನು daily ನನ್ನ free time ಅಲ್ಲಿ practice ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದೆ. ಕೇವಲ 15 days ಅಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ fluency ತುಂಬಾನೇ improve ಆಯ್ತು. ಮೊದಲು ನನಗೆ ಒಂದು ಅಥವಾ ಎರಡು star rating ಸಿಗ್ತಾ ಇತ್ತು, ಆದ್ರೆ ಈಗ five star ಸಿಗ್ತಾ ಇದೆ. Daily life ಅಲ್ಲಿ use ಮಾಡೋ basic words ಇಂದ ಮಾಡೋ real conversations ವರೆಗೂ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಈಸಿಯಾಗಿ ಕಲ್ಸ್ತಾರೆ. [I used to practice daily in my free time. In just 15 days, my fluency improved a lot. Earlier I used to get one or two-star ratings, but now I get five stars. They teach everything easily, from basic words used in daily life to real conversations.] Speaker A: Wow, ಇದೊಂದು super. ನಾನು ಕಲಿಬಹುದಾ? [Wow, this is super. Can I learn too?] Speaker B: Of course. ಇದು ಕೇವಲ two rupees per day. ಜೊತೆಗೆ seven days free trial ಕೂಡ ಇದೆ. ನೀವು ಇವತ್ತೇ SpeakX app ನ download ಮಾಡಿ. [Of course. It's just two rupees per day. Plus, there's a seven-day free trial too. Download the SpeakX app today.]

summary: A delivery boy impresses a customer with his fluent English, explaining that he learned it using the SpeakX app. He highlights features like AI teachers, step-by-step learning from Kannada, and affordable pricing. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app for a free trial.
